description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a scattering of white sesame seeds on its domed top. The upper bun sits atop a thick layer of creamy white sauce, followed by crisp green lettuce and slices of tomato. Beneath the vegetables, there is a layer of onions, pickles, and a slice of melted yellow cheese that drapes over a juicy, well-cooked beef patty. The lower bun is slightly darker and appears soft, supporting the stacked ingredients above. The overall appearance is appetizing, with vibrant colors and distinct layers that are clearly visible from all sides.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, visible layers of lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, cheese, and a beef patty.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sesame seed bun, white sauce, lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, cheese, and beef patty with all layers clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the tomato and cheese layers, with the lettuce and onions peeking out beneath the top bun.
description_view_2: The view emphasizes the melted cheese and beef patty, with the pickles and tomato more prominent on this side.
description_view_3: This side displays the pickles and tomato slices more clearly, with the cheese and patty still visible beneath the toppings.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, tomato, onion, and pickles are layered above a slice of cheese and a beef patty, all sandwiched between a sesame seed bun. The toppings are evenly distributed and clearly separated in distinct layers.
